name: pharos-contract-inspector
description: ABI-free EVM contract introspection for the Pharos Agent Center. Point it at any address on Pharos and get a function inventory, proxy resolution, interface detection, and a privileged/danger function report — straight from bytecode, no verified source required.

scripts.test: node test-risk.js && node test-core.js && node test-format.js && node test-disasm.js && node test-proxy.js && node test-rpc.js

author: arraya20
